Meaning.En: The combination of simultaneously sounded musical notes to produce a pleasing effect.
Meaning.Example: The choir sang in perfect harmony, creating a beautiful and moving performance.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sự kết hợp các nốt nhạc tạo thành âm thanh dễ chịu trong âm nhạc.
Situation.En: Describes the blending of musical notes to create a pleasing sound.

Meaning.En: A state of agreement or consistency between people or things; peaceful relations.
Meaning.Example: The couple lived in harmony with their neighbors for over twenty years.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả mối quan hệ tốt đẹp, không xung đột giữa các cá nhân hoặc nhóm.
Situation.En: Describes a peaceful, cooperative relationship among individuals or groups.

Meaning.Vi: Sự cân bằng, hài hòa (trong triết học, tự nhiên)
Meaning.En: A balanced and aesthetically pleasing arrangement of parts or elements.
Meaning.Example: The garden was designed with harmony in mind, blending colors, textures, and shapes seamlessly.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả sự cân đối, hài hòa trong thiết kế, nghệ thuật hoặc triết lý sống.
Situation.En: Describes balance and aesthetic coherence in design, art, or lifestyle philosophy.
